description_long: This is a medium-sized, round bowl with a slightly faceted rim, finished with a gold or brass-colored trim along the edge. The exterior and interior surfaces are primarily a worn, off-white or cream color, showing signs of age and use, including visible scuffs, scratches, and some tarnishing. There are subtle reflective qualities on the surface, suggesting a glazed ceramic or porcelain material. On at least two sides, a faint red floral or starburst motif is visible near the base of the exterior, adding a touch of decorative detail. The bowl's form is classic and utilitarian, with gently sloping sides and a wide opening suitable for holding food or liquids. Overall, the object appears sturdy but aged, with a utilitarian yet slightly decorative character.
description: A worn, off-white ceramic bowl with a gold-trimmed rim and faint red floral motifs, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: This view shows the gold-trimmed rim and the worn, off-white surface with some scuffs and reflective patches; no visible decorative motif.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a red floral or starburst motif near the base, along with the gold rim and more visible surface wear.
description_view_2: The bowl's gold rim and worn, off-white surface are prominent, with no visible motif from this angle.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side also displays the red floral motif near the base, along with the gold rim and signs of wear.
attribute_decorative_patterns: red floral or starburst motifs near the base on two sides; gold trim along the rim
